# AI Working Agreement

Apply these rules to all edits in this repository:

- Break the backlog into small, meaningful, low-hallucination problems.
- Solve one backlog slice at a time so context stays tight.
- Keep the existing premium jewelry theme unchanged while extending commerce behavior.
- Add automated tests for every code change.
- Add browser end-to-end coverage for every user-facing behavior change when the runtime supports it.
- After each pass, verify the slice with tests, linting, and typechecking.
- If verification is blocked by the environment, state the exact blocker instead of guessing.
